sync_type: Unidirectional (HubSpot → Slack via webhook/connector) or bidirectional (via Slack Workflow Builder)
popularity: high — most common sales/marketing notification setup: deals closing → Slack alert, form submissions → Slack channel

authentication_requirements.hubspot_side: OAuth 2.0 with webhook scopes. Workflow action scopes for creating Slack messages.
authentication_requirements.slack_side: OAuth 2.0 Bot Token with chat:write, channels:read, incoming-webhook scopes.

common_use_cases: New deal created in HubSpot → Slack channel notification to sales team
High-value deal stage change ('Closed Won') → Slack @here alert
HubSpot form submission → Slack lead notification with contact details
Slack shortcut → Create HubSpot contact/ticket from Slack message
HubSpot ticket priority escalation → Slack channel with thread

hubspot_endpoints.purpose: Fetch deal details for Slack notification
Fetch contact details for Slack notification

slack_endpoints.purpose: Send ephemeral message to specific user
Open Slack modal for HubSpot actions

edge_cases_and_errors.error_code: Slack rate limit (1 per second per method)
edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Bulk deal update in HubSpot triggers 50 Slack messages simultaneously. Slack returns 429 with Retry-After.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Batch Slack notifications. Use a queue in your middleware. Send a single summary message instead of individual alerts.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Slack bot token has chat:write scope but bot hasn't joined the target channel. POST returns not_in_channel error.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Call conversations.join before chat.postMessage. Or use chat.postMessage with channel ID (not name) and ensure bot is invited.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: HubSpot deal amount $1,000,000 sent as plain text without Slack Block Kit formatting. Message looks unprofessional.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Format Slack messages using Block Kit (blocks array in API call). Use section blocks with markdown text.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: HubSpot webhook delivery retries (up to 24h) cause duplicate Slack messages if middleware doesn't deduplicate by webhook event ID.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Track HubSpot webhook eventId in middleware. Skip processing if eventId already handled.

edge_cases_and_errors.error_code: Slack token expiry (OAuth bot tokens don't expire by default unless revoked)
edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Slack bot token revoked by workspace admin. Middleware starts getting 401 errors silently.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Monitor for 401 responses from Slack API. Set up alert to re-authorize Slack app. Use token rotation if using granular permissions.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: HubSpot deal with 50+ custom fields sends a 10,000-character message. Slack max is 4,000 characters per block text.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Truncate field list to top 5-10 fields in Slack message. Add 'View in HubSpot' link for full record.

edge_cases_and_errors.error_code: Thread replies lost on webhook timeout
edge_cases_and_errors.cause: HubSpot webhook expects a 200 response within 5 seconds. Slack rate limit causes middleware to delay, HubSpot retries and creates duplicate threads.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Acknowledge webhook immediately (200, empty body). Process Slack message asynchronously in background.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: HubSpot data contains characters that break Slack Block Kit markdown (unclosed * or _) or invalid Block Kit JSON structure.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Escape HubSpot text fields before inserting into Block Kit templates. Validate JSON before sending. Use Slack Block Kit Builder.

community_solutions.problem: Slack webhook URL vs API token confusion
community_solutions.solution: Incoming Webhooks use a fixed URL (no token). API calls use Bot Token (xoxb-). Choose one pattern and stick with it.

community_solutions.problem: Slack rate limit on bulk notification retry loops
community_solutions.solution: HubSpot webhook retries + Slack rate limit = cascade failure. Implement dead-letter queue after 3 failed Slack attempts.
